SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILBERT, JUDY SERVED APR-01-2002, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT J C PENNEY LOFE INSURANCE
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-02-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-24-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-10-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JC PENNEY LIFE INSURANCE COMPAPNY JC PENNEY CO., INC.
NOTICE TO ADVERSE PARTY OF REMOVAL OF CIVIL ACTION TO FEDERAL COURT FILED BY DEFENDANT JC PENNEY LIFE INSURANCE COMPAPNY JC PENNEY CO., INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-24-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR REMOVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
